title: Office of Naval Research
description: If you’d like to get on our email distribution list to be notified when the next issue of Future Force is available, please send a note to futureforce@navy.mil.
text:
If you’d like to get on our email distribution list to be notified when the next issue of Future Force is available, please send a note to futureforce@navy.mil.
Future Force is intended to be primarily an online publication. However, we do have a limited-production print edition for valid commands and organizations. If you would like for your command to receive a copy of the print edition, please contact the managing editor by sending an email with the name of your command or organization, address, and number of copies you would like to receive to futureforce@navy.mil, or call (703) 696-5031 or write to Managing Editor, Future Force Magazine, Office of Naval Research, 875 N. Randolph Street, Ste. 1425, Arlington, VA 22203.
Please note that we are unable to provide personal subscriptions at this time.
